hooks.command: file=$(python3 -c "import sys,json;print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$file" ] && exit 0; root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$file")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; if git -C "$root" check-ignore -q "$file" 2>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; branch=$(git -C "$root" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then echo 'Blocked: editing a repo file on the protected main branch. Create a feature branch first (git checkout -b <scope>-<short-desc>), then retry.' >&2; exit 2; fi
